mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mo_picking_summary (id, doc_no, item_code, business_qty, match_qty, current_num, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, bin_code, unit_code, unit_name, barcode, item_name, item_spec, remark, create_by, create_time, shjg) VALUES (#{id}, #{docNo}, #{itemCode}, #{businessQty}, #{matchQty}, #{currentNum}, #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{binCode}, #{unitCode}, #{unitName}, #{barcode}, #{itemName}, #{itemSpec}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{shjg});
mapper.update: UPDATE mo_picking_summary SET match_qty = match_qty + #{qty}, barcode = #{barcode}, current_num = current_num + #{qty} WHERE id = #{id} AND create_by = #{createBy}
UPDATE mo_picking_summary SET match_qty = match_qty - #{qty}, current_num = current_num - #{qty} WHERE id = #{id} AND create_by = #{createBy}
UPDATE mo_picking_summary SET match_qty = match_qty - #{qty}, current_num = 0.0 WHERE id = #{id} AND create_by = #{createBy}
UPDATE ISSUE_RECEIPT_D SET UDF023 = 'Y', UDF001 = UDF001 + #{qty} WHERE ISSUE_RECEIPT_D_ID = #{issueReceiptId}
UPDATE MO SET UDF001 = #{qty} WHERE DOC_NO = #{docNo}
UPDATE MO_RECEIPT_D SET ACCEPTED_QTY = #{qty} WHERE MO_RECEIPT_D_ID = #{docDNoID}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND chag_type = 4
mapper.select:
SELECT RTRIM(TY001) TY001, RTRIM(TY002) TY002, TY003, TY004, MOCTY.UDF01, RTRIM(MOCTY.UDF02) UDF02, RTRIM(MOCTY.UDF05) UDF05, B.ITEM_CODE productId, UNIT_NAME unit, A.ITEM_DESCRIPTION productName, A.ITEM_SPECIFICATION specification, ISNULL(F.WORK_CENTER_CODE, '') workCenterId, MD002 workCenterName FROM MOCTY LEFT JOIN MO A ON A.DOC_NO = CONCAT(RTRIM(TY001 COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CS_AS), '-', RTRIM(TY002 COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CS_AS)) LEFT JOIN dbo.WORK_CENTER AS F ON A.SOURCE_ID_ROid = F.WORK_CENTER_ID LEFT JOIN CMSMD ON MD001 = ISNULL(F.WORK_CENTER_CODE, '') LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.ITEM AS B ON A.ITEM_ID = B.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT ON UNIT.UNIT_ID = A.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN MOCTYADDINFO ON MOCTY.UDF05 = MOCTYADDINFO.moctyuuid COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CS_AS WHERE TY004 > 0 AND A.STATUS != 'Y' AND A.STATUS != 'y' AND A.ApproveStatus = 'Y'
AND A.DOC_NO IN (SELECT DISTINCT RTRIM(TE006)+'-'+RTRIM(TE007) FROM SFCTE2 WHERE RTRIM(TE001)+'-'+RTRIM(TE002) = #{docNo})
UNION SELECT RTRIM(TY001) TY001, RTRIM(TY002) TY002, TY003, TY004, MOCTY.UDF01, RTRIM(MOCTY.UDF02) UDF02, RTRIM(MOCTY.UDF05) UDF05, B.ITEM_CODE productId, UNIT_NAME unit, A.ITEM_DESCRIPTION productName, A.ITEM_SPECIFICATION specification, ISNULL(F.WORK_CENTER_CODE, '') workCenterId, MD002 workCenterName FROM MOCTY LEFT JOIN MO A ON A.DOC_NO = CONCAT(RTRIM(TY001 COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CS_AS), '-', RTRIM(TY002 COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CS_AS)) LEFT JOIN dbo.WORK_CENTER AS F ON A.SOURCE_ID_ROid = F.WORK_CENTER_ID LEFT JOIN CMSMD ON MD001 = ISNULL(F.WORK_CENTER_CODE, '') LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.ITEM AS B ON A.ITEM_ID = B.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT ON UNIT.UNIT_ID = A.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN MOCTYADDINFO ON MOCTY.UDF05 = MOCTYADDINFO.moctyuuid COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CS_AS WHERE TY004 > 0 AND A.STATUS != 'Y' AND A.STATUS != 'y' AND A.ApproveStatus = 'Y'
AND A.DOC_NO = #{docNo}

SELECT A.DOC_NO TY001, A.DOC_NO TY002, A.DOC_DATE TY003, 0 TY004, '' UDF01, '' UDF02, '' UDF05, B.ITEM_CODE productId, UNIT_NAME unit, A.ITEM_DESCRIPTION productName, A.ITEM_SPECIFICATION specification, ISNULL(F.WORK_CENTER_CODE, '') workCenterId, MD002 workCenterName, A.DOC_NO FROM MO A LEFT JOIN dbo.WORK_CENTER AS F ON A.SOURCE_ID_ROid = F.WORK_CENTER_ID LEFT JOIN CMSMD ON MD001 = ISNULL(F.WORK_CENTER_CODE, '') LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.ITEM AS B ON A.ITEM_ID = B.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT ON UNIT.UNIT_ID = A.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID --LEFT JOIN MOCTYADDINFO ON MOCTY.UDF05 = MOCTYADDINFO.moctyuuid COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CS_AS WHERE A.DOC_NO = #{docNo} --TY004 > 0 AND --A.STATUS != 'Y' AND A.STATUS != 'y' AND A.ApproveStatus = 'Y'

SELECT id,warehouse_no warehouseNo, ISNULL(cell_no,'') cellNo, item_no itemNo, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, barcode, qty, unit_no unitNo, chag_type chagType, status_code statusCode, create_by createBy,create_date createDate FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = 4

SELECT ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE lotCode, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_D_ID issueReceiptId, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION itemName, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec, ITEM.ITEM_CODE itemCode, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.UDF023 status, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY outboundQty, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.UDF001 signedForQty, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT_D LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_LOT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID = ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE ON WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN MO ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.MO_ID = MO.MO_ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE_RECEIPT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID LEFT JOIN WORK_CENTER ON ISSUE_RECEIPT.SOURCE_ID_ROid = WORK_CENTER.WORK_CENTER_ID WHERE ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.UDF023 != 'Y' AND WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME IN ( '动力仓-汽', '行走仓-汽', '电器仓-汽', '包材仓-汽', '塑件仓-汽', '金工成品仓-汽', '标件仓-电', '五金仓-电', '包材仓-电', '电器仓-电', '行走仓-电', '电池仓-电', '铝车架成品仓' )
AND MO.UDF021 LIKE ('%' + #{docNo} + '%')
AND WORK_CENTER.WORK_CENTER_NAME LIKE ('%' + #{workName} + '%')
AND WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME LIKE ('%' + #{warehouseName} + '%')
AND ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_DATE >= #{startTime}
AND #{endTime} >= ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_DATE

SELECT DISTINCT A.DOC_NO docNo,A.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID docId, B.UDF021 khdh, D.WORK_CENTER_NAME workName, A.DOC_DATE docDate, A.REMARK remark,E.WAREHOUSE_NAME warehouseName FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT A LEFT JOIN ISSUE_RECEIPT_D C ON C.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID = A.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID LEFT JOIN MO B ON C.MO_ID=B.MO_ID LEFT JOIN WORK_CENTER D ON A.SOURCE_ID_ROid = D.WORK_CENTER_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE E ON E.WAREHOUSE_ID=C.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE A.SOURCE_ID_RTK = 'WORK_CENTER' AND C.UDF023 != 'Y' AND B.UDF021 LIKE ('%' + #{docNo} + '%') ORDER BY A.DOC_DATE DESC

SELECT ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE lotCode, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_D_ID issueReceiptId, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION itemName, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec, ITEM.ITEM_CODE itemCode, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.UDF023 status, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY outboundQty, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.UDF001 signedForQty FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT_D LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_LOT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID = ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID WHERE ISSUE_RECEIPT_D_ID = #{id} AND ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.UDF023 != 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT_D LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_LOT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID = ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE ON WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN MO ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.MO_ID = MO.MO_ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE_RECEIPT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID LEFT JOIN WORK_CENTER ON ISSUE_RECEIPT.SOURCE_ID_ROid = WORK_CENTER.WORK_CENTER_ID WHERE ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.UDF023 = 'Y' AND WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME IN ( '动力仓-汽', '行走仓-汽', '电器仓-汽', '包材仓-汽', '塑件仓-汽', '金工成品仓-汽', '标件仓-电', '五金仓-电', '包材仓-电', '电器仓-电', '行走仓-电', '电池仓-电', '铝车架成品仓' )
AND MO.UDF021 LIKE ('%' + #{docNo} + '%')
AND WORK_CENTER.WORK_CENTER_NAME LIKE ('%' + #{workName} + '%')
AND WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME LIKE ('%' + #{warehouseName} + '%')
AND ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_DATE >= #{startTime}
AND #{endTime} >= ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_DATE

SELECT MO.UDF021 khdh, MO.DOC_NO moDocNo, ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE lotCode, MO_RECEIPT_D.MO_RECEIPT_D_ID moReceiptId, MO_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION itemName, MO_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec, ITEM.ITEM_CODE itemCode, MO_RECEIPT_D.ACCEPTED_QTY acceptedQty, MO_RECEIPT_D.UDF001 signedForQty FROM MO_RECEIPT_D LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = MO_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_LOT ON MO_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID = ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE ON WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = MO_RECEIPT_D.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN MO ON MO_RECEIPT_D.MO_ID = MO.MO_ID LEFT JOIN MO_RECEIPT ON MO_RECEIPT.MO_RECEIPT_ID = MO_RECEIPT_D.MO_RECEIPT_ID LEFT JOIN WORK_CENTER ON MO_RECEIPT.SOURCE_ID_ROid = WORK_CENTER.WORK_CENTER_ID WHERE MO_RECEIPT_D.UDF023 != 'Y' AND (ITEM.ITEM_CODE LIKE '1%' OR ITEM.ITEM_CODE LIKE '8%') AND MO.UDF021 LIKE ('%' + #{khdh} + '%') -- 客户单号 AND MO.DOC_NO LIKE ('%' + #{moDocNo} + '%') -- 工单号 AND MO_RECEIPT.DOC_DATE >= #{startTime} AND #{endTime} >= MO_RECEIPT.DOC_DATE
SELECT SUM(ISNULL(MO_RECEIPT_D.ACCEPTED_QTY, 0)) acceptedQty, B.UDF001 signedForQty FROM MO B LEFT JOIN MO_RECEIPT_D ON MO_RECEIPT_D.MO_ID = B.MO_ID WHERE B.DOC_NO = #{id} GROUP BY B.UDF001

SELECT B.DOC_NO moDocNo, B.PLAN_QTY moQty, ITEM.ITEM_NAME itemName, ITEM.ITEM_CODE itemCode, ITEM.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec, B.UDF022 khdh, SUM(ISNULL(MO_RECEIPT_D.ACCEPTED_QTY, 0)) acceptedQty, B.UDF001 signedForQty FROM MO B LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = B.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN MO_RECEIPT_D ON MO_RECEIPT_D.MO_ID = B.MO_ID WHERE B.UDF022 = (SELECT B.UDF022 FROM SN_ITEM_RECORD A LEFT JOIN MO B ON A.SOURCE_ID_ROid=B.MO_ID WHERE SN_NO = #{snNo}) AND ITEM_CODE LIKE '1%' GROUP BY B.DOC_NO,B.UDF022,ITEM.ITEM_NAME,ITEM.ITEM_CODE,ITEM.ITEM_SPECIFICATION,B.PLAN_QTY,B.UDF001 ORDER BY B.DOC_NO

SELECT MO_RECEIPT_ID, DOC_NO FROM MO_RECEIPT WHERE ADMIN_UNIT_ID IN ( SELECT ADMIN_UNIT_ID FROM ADMIN_UNIT WHERE ADMIN_UNIT_CODE IN ('DBZ', 'QBZ') ) AND ApproveStatus = 'N'
AND DOC_NO LIKE ('%' + #{docNo} + '%')

SELECT B.MO_RECEIPT_D_ID docDNoId, MO.DOC_NO moDocNo, MO.UDF022 khdh, ITEM.ITEM_CODE itemCode, B.ITEM_DESCRIPTION itemName, B.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec, B.ACCEPTED_QTY acceptedQty FROM MO_RECEIPT A LEFT JOIN MO_RECEIPT_D B ON A.MO_RECEIPT_ID = B.MO_RECEIPT_ID LEFT JOIN MO ON B.MO_ID = MO.MO_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = B.ITEM_ID WHERE A.DOC_NO LIKE ('%' + #{docNo} + '%')
SELECT DOC_NO FROM MO_RECEIPT WHERE ApproveStatus = 'N'
SELECT SUM(qty) FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE barcode = #{barcode} AND chag_type = #{chagType} AND create_by = #{createBy}
